```{r mortality-table}
            `NND`=format(n_nnd, big.mark=","),
            `TB`=format(n_tb, big.mark=","),
            `SBR(/1000)`=SBR, `NND Rate(/1000)`=NND_Rate, `PMR(/1000)`=PMR)

kable(mort_tbl, caption="Mortality Rates (SBR=SB/TB; NND=NND/LB; PMR=(SB+NND)/TB)") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options=c("striped","hover","condensed"), full_width=TRUE) %>%
  row_spec(nrow(mort_tbl), bold=TRUE, background="#ECF0F1")
```

## Outcome Counts

```{r outcome-counts}
outcome_counts <- tibble(
  Outcome=c("Total Records","Live Births","Stillbirths","Neonatal Deaths",
            "Perinatal Deaths","Preterm Births","Low Birthweight"),
  Count=c(nrow(unified),
          sum(unified$out_livebirth=="Yes", na.rm=TRUE),
          sum(unified$out_stillbirth=="Yes", na.rm=TRUE),
          sum(unified$out_nnd=="Yes", na.rm=TRUE),
          sum(unified$out_perinatal_death=="Yes", na.rm=TRUE),
          sum(unified$out_preterm=="Yes", na.rm=TRUE),
          sum(unified$out_lbw=="Yes", na.rm=TRUE))) %>%
  mutate(Count_Fmt=format(Count, big.mark=","),
         Pct=sprintf("%.2f%%", Count/nrow(unified)*100))

kable(outcome_counts %>% select(Outcome, Count_Fmt, Pct),
      col.names=c("Outcome","Count","% of Total"),
      caption="Outcome Summary") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options=c("striped","hover","condensed"), full_width=FALSE)
```

## Variable Inventory

```{r variable-inventory-simple}
var_inv <- tibble(
  Variable=names(unified),
  Type=sapply(unified, function(x) class(x)[1]),
  N_NonMissing=sapply(unified, function(x) sum(!is.na(x))),
  Pct_Complete=sapply(unified, function(x) round(mean(!is.na(x))*100, 1)),
  N_Unique=sapply(unified, function(x) n_distinct(x, na.rm=TRUE)),
  Section=case_when(
    Variable %in% var_group_outcomes ~ "1: Outcomes",
    Variable %in% var_group_maternal ~ "2: Maternal",
    Variable %in% var_group_household ~ "3: Household/SES",
    Variable %in% var_group_env ~ "4: Environmental",
    Variable %in% var_group_dates ~ "5: Dates",
    Variable %in% var_group_ids ~ "Identifiers",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  )
) %>% arrange(Section, desc(Pct_Complete))

kable(var_inv %>% select(Section, Variable, Type, N_NonMissing, Pct_Complete, N_Unique),
      col.names=c("Section","Variable","Type","N (non-missing)","% Complete","Unique"),
      caption="Complete Variable Inventory (v10.17 Schema)") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options=c("striped","hover","condensed"), full_width=TRUE, font_size=10) %>%
  collapse_rows(columns=1, valign="top")
```

## Variable Inventory by Study

```{r variable-inventory-by-study}
# Build per-study completeness for each variable
studies <- sort(unique(unified$study_source))

var_inv_study <- tibble(Variable = names(unified)) %>%
  mutate(
    Type = sapply(Variable, function(v) class(unified[[v]])[1]),
    Section = case_when(
      Variable %in% var_group_outcomes ~ "1: Outcomes",
      Variable %in% var_group_maternal ~ "2: Maternal",
      Variable %in% var_group_household ~ "3: Household/SES",
      Variable %in% var_group_env ~ "4: Environmental",
      Variable %in% var_group_dates ~ "5: Dates",
      Variable %in% var_group_ids ~ "Identifiers",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),
    N_NonMissing = sapply(Variable, function(v) sum(!is.na(unified[[v]]))),
    Pct_Complete = sapply(Variable, function(v) round(mean(!is.na(unified[[v]])) * 100, 1)),
    N_Unique = sapply(Variable, function(v) n_distinct(unified[[v]], na.rm=TRUE))
  )

# Add per-study completeness columns
for (s in studies) {
  sub <- unified %>% filter(study_source == s)
  var_inv_study[[s]] <- sapply(var_inv_study$Variable, function(v) {
    if (v %in% names(sub)) round(mean(!is.na(sub[[v]])) * 100, 1) else NA_real_
  })
}

var_inv_study <- var_inv_study %>% arrange(Section, desc(Pct_Complete))

# Helper: colour a percentage value
fmt_pct <- function(val) {
  if (is.na(val)) return(cell_spec("—", "html", color="#999999", background="#f0f0f0"))
  bg <- if (val == 0) "#f8d7da" else if (val < 50) "#fff3cd" else if (val < 80) "#d4edda" else "#c3e6cb"
  fg <- if (val == 0) "#721c24" else if (val < 50) "#856404" else "black"
  cell_spec(val, "html", color=fg, background=bg, bold=(val==100))
}

# Pre-format the display table
display_df <- var_inv_study %>%
  mutate(
    Pct_fmt = sapply(Pct_Complete, fmt_pct)
  )

# Format each study column
for (s in studies) {
  display_df[[paste0(s, "_fmt")]] <- sapply(display_df[[s]], fmt_pct)
}

# Select formatted columns for output
fmt_study_cols <- paste0(studies, "_fmt")

final_df <- display_df %>%
  select(Section, Variable, Type, N_NonMissing, Pct_fmt, N_Unique, all_of(fmt_study_cols))

col_names <- c("Section", "Variable", "Type", "N (all)", "% (all)", "Unique", paste0("% ", studies))

kable(final_df, format="html", escape=FALSE, col.names=col_names,
      caption="Variable Inventory by Study Source (% Complete)") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options=c("striped","hover","condensed"), full_width=TRUE, font_size=9) %>%
  add_header_above(c(" "=3, "Overall"=3, "% Complete by Study"=length(studies)))
```

## Export Variable Inventory to Excel

```{r export-variable-inventory, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(openxlsx)

# Use the unformatted var_inv_study (not the cell_spec version)
export_df <- var_inv_study %>%
  select(Section, Variable, Type, N_NonMissing, Pct_Complete, N_Unique, all_of(studies))

names(export_df) <- c("Section", "Variable", "Type", "N (all)", "% (all)", 
                       "Unique", paste0("% ", studies))

wb <- createWorkbook()
addWorksheet(wb, "Variable Inventory")
writeData(wb, 1, export_df, 
          headerStyle = createStyle(textDecoration = "bold", 
                                    fgFill = "#4472C4", 
                                    fontColour = "white"))

# Freeze top row and first 2 columns
freezePane(wb, 1, firstActiveRow = 2, firstActiveCol = 3)

# Auto-width columns
setColWidths(wb, 1, cols = 1:ncol(export_df), widths = "auto")

# Conditional formatting on % columns (col 5 = overall, then study columns)
pct_cols <- c(5, 7:ncol(export_df))
n_rows <- nrow(export_df)

for (col in pct_cols) {
  conditionalFormatting(wb, 1, cols = col, rows = 2:(n_rows + 1),
    type = "expression", rule = "==0",
    style = createStyle(bgFill = "#f8d7da", fontColour = "#721c24"))
  conditionalFormatting(wb, 1, cols = col, rows = 2:(n_rows + 1),
    type = "expression", rule = "<50",
    style = createStyle(bgFill = "#fff3cd", fontColour = "#856404"))
  conditionalFormatting(wb, 1, cols = col, rows = 2:(n_rows + 1),
    type = "expression", rule = "<80",
    style = createStyle(bgFill = "#d4edda"))
  conditionalFormatting(wb, 1, cols = col, rows = 2:(n_rows + 1),
    type = "expression", rule = ">=80",
    style = createStyle(bgFill = "#c3e6cb"))
}

# Add borders
addStyle(wb, 1, 
         style = createStyle(border = "TopBottomLeftRight", borderColour = "#cccccc"),
         rows = 1:(n_rows + 1), cols = 1:ncol(export_df), 
         gridExpand = TRUE, stack = TRUE)

saveWorkbook(wb, "output/variable_inventory_by_study.xlsx", overwrite = TRUE)
cat("✅ Exported to: output/variable_inventory_by_study.xlsx\n")
```

# PowerPoint Export

```{r pptx-export, echo=TRUE, results='hide'}
cat("\n====================================================================\n")
cat("              GENERATING POWERPOINT PRESENTATION\n")
cat("====================================================================\n\n")

PPTX_PATH <- file.path("output", sprintf("unified_analysis_v%s.pptx", VERSION))
ppt <- read_pptx()

add_plot_slide <- function(ppt, plot_obj, title) {
  ppt <- add_slide(ppt, layout="Title and Content", master="Office Theme")
  ppt <- ph_with(ppt, value=title, location=ph_location_type(type="title"))
  ppt <- ph_with(ppt, value=dml(ggobj=plot_obj), location=ph_location_type(type="body"))
  return(ppt)
}
add_title_slide <- function(ppt, title, subtitle) {
  ppt <- add_slide(ppt, layout="Title Slide", master="Office Theme")
  ppt <- ph_with(ppt, value=title, location=ph_location_type(type="ctrTitle"))
  ppt <- ph_with(ppt, value=subtitle, location=ph_location_type(type="subTitle"))
  return(ppt)
}

overall <- exec_table %>% filter(study_source=="OVERALL")

ppt <- add_title_slide(ppt,
  "Unified Perinatal Dataset Analysis",
  sprintf("Stillbirth & Neonatal Death Prediction\nJoseph Akuze (LSHTM) | %s | N=%s",
          format(Sys.Date(), "%B %d, %Y"), format(nrow(unified), big.mark=",")))

# Study distribution
ppt <- add_plot_slide(ppt,
  ggplot(study_dist, aes(x=reorder(study_source,n), y=n, fill=study_source)) +
    geom_col(width=0.75, show.legend=FALSE) +
    geom_text(aes(label=sprintf("%s (%.1f%%)", format(n,big.mark=","), pct)),
              hjust=-0.05, size=4, fontface="bold") +
    coord_flip() + scale_fill_manual(values=COLORS$studies) +
    scale_y_continuous(expand=expansion(mult=c(0, 0.3)), labels=comma) +
    labs(title="Records by Study", x=NULL, y="N") + theme_report(),
  "Records by Study")

# Country
ppt <- add_plot_slide(ppt,
  ggplot(country_dist, aes(x=reorder(mat_country, total), y=n, fill=study_source)) +
    geom_col(width=0.8) + coord_flip() +
    scale_fill_manual(values=COLORS$studies, name="Study") +
    scale_y_continuous(expand=expansion(mult=c(0,0.1)), labels=comma) +
    labs(title=sprintf("All Countries (N=%d)", n_countries), x=NULL, y="Records") +
    theme_report() + theme(legend.position="right"),
  "Geographic Distribution")

# ★ v10.13: Study Design & Module slides
if (has_study_design) {
  design_ppt <- unified %>%
    mutate(study_design = ifelse(is.na(study_design)|trimws(as.character(study_design))=="", "Missing", as.character(study_design))) %>%
    count(study_source, study_design, name="n") %>%
    group_by(study_source) %>% mutate(pct=n/sum(n)*100) %>% ungroup()
  ppt <- add_plot_slide(ppt,
    ggplot(design_ppt, aes(x=study_source, y=n, fill=study_design)) +
      geom_col(position="fill", width=0.75) +
      scale_fill_manual(values=COLORS$study_design, name="Study Design") +
      scale_y_continuous(labels=percent) +
      labs(title="Study Design by Source", x=NULL, y="Proportion") +
      theme_report() + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45, hjust=1)),
    "Study Design Distribution")
}

if (has_ga_method) {
  gam_ppt <- unified %>%
    mutate(out_ga_method = ifelse(is.na(out_ga_method)|trimws(as.character(out_ga_method))=="", "Missing", as.character(out_ga_method))) %>%
    count(study_source, out_ga_method, name="n") %>%
    group_by(study_source) %>% mutate(pct=n/sum(n)*100) %>% ungroup()
  ppt <- add_plot_slide(ppt,
    ggplot(gam_ppt, aes(x=study_source, y=n, fill=out_ga_method)) +
      geom_col(position="fill", width=0.75) +
      scale_fill_manual(values=COLORS$ga_method, name="GA Method") +
      scale_y_continuous(labels=percent) +
      labs(title="GA Measurement Method by Study", x=NULL, y="Proportion") +
      theme_report() + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45, hjust=1)),
    "GA Method Distribution")
}

# SB
ppt <- add_title_slide(ppt, "Stillbirth Analysis", "Rates and Risk Factors")
ppt <- add_plot_slide(ppt,
  ggplot(sb_by_study, aes(x=reorder(study_source,rate), y=rate)) +
    geom_col(fill=COLORS$outcomes["Stillbirth"], width=0.7, alpha=0.9) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=ci_low, ymax=ci_high), width=0.25) +
    geom_text(aes(label=sprintf("%.1f", rate)), hjust=-0.2, size=4.5, fontface="bold") +
    coord_flip() + scale_y_continuous(expand=expansion(mult=c(0, 0.2))) +
    labs(title="Stillbirth Rate by Study", subtitle="SB/TB x1000", x=NULL, y="Rate/1000") +
    theme_report(),
  "Stillbirth Rate by Study")

# NND
ppt <- add_title_slide(ppt, "Neonatal Death Analysis", "Rates and Risk Factors")
ppt <- add_plot_slide(ppt,
  ggplot(nnd_by_study, aes(x=reorder(study_source,rate), y=rate)) +
    geom_col(fill=COLORS$outcomes["NND"], width=0.7, alpha=0.9) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=ci_low, ymax=ci_high), width=0.25) +
    geom_text(aes(label=sprintf("%.1f", rate)), hjust=-0.2, size=4.5, fontface="bold") +
    coord_flip() + scale_y_continuous(expand=expansion(mult=c(0, 0.2))) +
    labs(title="NND Rate by Study", subtitle="NND/LB x1000", x=NULL, y="Rate/1000") +
    theme_report(),
  "NND Rate by Study")

# Birth chars
ppt <- add_title_slide(ppt, "Birth Characteristics", "GA, BW, Sex, Apgar")

ppt <- add_plot_slide(ppt,
  ggplot(ga_data, aes(x=out_ga_weeks, fill=study_source)) +
    geom_histogram(binwidth=1, color="white", alpha=0.8) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=37, linetype="dashed", color="#E74C3C", linewidth=1) +
    scale_fill_manual(values=COLORS$studies, name="Study") +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(15,46,5)) +
    labs(title="Gestational Age Distribution", x="Weeks", y="Count") + theme_report(),
  "GA Distribution")

ppt <- add_plot_slide(ppt,
  ggplot(bw_data, aes(x=out_birthweight_g, fill=study_source)) +
    geom_histogram(binwidth=100, color="white", alpha=0.8) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=2500, linetype="dashed", color="#E74C3C", linewidth=1) +
    scale_fill_manual(values=COLORS$studies, name="Study") +
    scale_x_continuous(labels=comma) +
    labs(title="Birthweight Distribution", x="Grams", y="Count") + theme_report(),
  "Birthweight Distribution")

ppt <- add_plot_slide(ppt,
  ggplot(sex_data, aes(x=study_source, y=n, fill=sex_clean)) +
    geom_col(position="fill", width=0.75) +
    scale_fill_manual(values=COLORS$sex, name="Sex") +
    scale_y_continuous(labels=percent) +
    labs(title="Infant Sex Distribution", x=NULL, y="Proportion") +
    theme_report() + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45, hjust=1)),
  "Sex Distribution")

ppt <- add_plot_slide(ppt,
  ggplot(apgar_data, aes(x=birth_outcome, y=out_apgar_5min, fill=birth_outcome)) +
    geom_boxplot(width=0.6, outlier.alpha=0.3) +
    scale_fill_manual(values=c("Stillbirth"="#C0392B","Neonatal Death"="#8E44AD","Survived"="#27AE60")) +
    labs(title="Apgar by Outcome", x=NULL, y="5-min Apgar") + theme_report(),
  "Apgar by Outcome")

# Maternal
ppt <- add_title_slide(ppt, "Maternal Characteristics", "Demographics")
ppt <- add_plot_slide(ppt,
  ggplot(age_data, aes(x=mat_age, fill=study_source)) +
    geom_histogram(binwidth=2, color="white", alpha=0.8) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=c(18,35), linetype="dashed", color="#E74C3C") +
    scale_fill_manual(values=COLORS$studies, name="Study") +
    labs(title="Maternal Age Distribution", x="Age (years)", y="Count") + theme_report(),
  "Maternal Age")

# Completeness
ppt <- add_title_slide(ppt, "Data Completeness", "Quality Assessment")
p_out <- plot_completeness_hm(unified, var_group_outcomes, "Outcomes Completeness")
if (!is.null(p_out)) ppt <- add_plot_slide(ppt, p_out, "Outcomes Completeness")
p_mat <- plot_completeness_hm(unified, var_group_maternal, "Maternal Completeness")
if (!is.null(p_mat)) ppt <- add_plot_slide(ppt, p_mat, "Maternal Completeness")
p_hh <- plot_completeness_hm(unified, var_group_household, "Household Completeness")
if (!is.null(p_hh)) ppt <- add_plot_slide(ppt, p_hh, "Household Completeness")

ppt <- add_plot_slide(ppt,
  ggplot(group_summary, aes(x=reorder(group, mean_pct), y=mean_pct, fill=group)) +
    geom_col(width=0.7, show.legend=FALSE) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=min_pct, ymax=max_pct), width=0.25) +
    geom_text(aes(label=sprintf("%.1f%%", mean_pct)), hjust=-0.1, size=4.5, fontface="bold") +
    coord_flip() + scale_fill_brewer(palette="Set2") +
    scale_y_continuous(expand=expansion(mult=c(0, 0.2)), limits=c(0, 100)) +
    labs(title="Completeness by Group", x=NULL, y="%") + theme_report(),
  "Completeness by Group")

# Variable deep dive
ppt <- add_title_slide(ppt, "Variable Deep Dive", "All Key Variables")

plot_variable <- function(df, var, title=NULL) {
  if (!var %in% names(df)) return(NULL)
  x <- df[[var]]; if (is.null(title)) title <- var
  if (is.numeric(x)) {
    x_clean <- x[!is.na(x)]; if (length(x_clean)<10) return(NULL)
    ggplot(data.frame(x=x_clean), aes(x=x)) +
      geom_histogram(bins=30, fill="#3498DB", color="white", alpha=0.8) +
      labs(title=title, subtitle=sprintf("N=%s | Mean=%.1f | Median=%.1f",
        format(length(x_clean),big.mark=","), mean(x_clean), median(x_clean)),
        x=var, y="Count") + theme_report()
  } else {
    x_chr <- as.character(x)
    x_chr[is.na(x_chr)|trimws(x_chr)==""] <- "<Missing>"
    tab <- as.data.frame(table(x_chr)) %>% arrange(desc(Freq)) %>% slice_head(n=15) %>%
      mutate(pct=Freq/sum(Freq)*100)
    ggplot(tab, aes(x=reorder(x_chr,Freq), y=Freq, fill=Freq)) +
      geom_col(show.legend=FALSE) +
      geom_text(aes(label=sprintf("%s (%.1f%%)", format(Freq,big.mark=","), pct)),
                hjust=-0.05, size=3.5) +
      coord_flip() + scale_fill_gradient(low="#85C1E9", high="#2E86AB") +
      scale_y_continuous(expand=expansion(mult=c(0, 0.3))) +
      labs(title=title, subtitle=sprintf("Top categories (N=%s)", format(sum(tab$Freq),big.mark=",")),
           x=NULL, y="Count") + theme_report()
  }
}

for (v in c("out_stillbirth","out_nnd","out_livebirth","out_perinatal_death",
            "out_preterm","out_lbw","out_sga","out_fresh_stillbirth","out_macerated_stillbirth")) {
  p <- plot_variable(unified, v); if (!is.null(p)) ppt <- add_plot_slide(ppt, p, paste("Variable:", v))
}
for (v in c("out_ga_weeks","out_ga_method","out_birthweight_g","out_infant_sex","out_apgar_1min","out_apgar_5min","out_multiple")) {
  p <- plot_variable(unified, v); if (!is.null(p)) ppt <- add_plot_slide(ppt, p, paste("Variable:", v))
}
for (v in c("mat_age","mat_marital_status","mat_education","mat_religion","mat_ethnicity",
            "mat_parity","mat_gravidity","mat_delivery_mode","mat_delivery_location",
            "mat_birth_attendant","mat_hiv_status","mat_hypertension","mat_preeclampsia","mat_anc_visits")) {
  p <- plot_variable(unified, v); if (!is.null(p)) ppt <- add_plot_slide(ppt, p, paste("Variable:", v))
}
for (v in c("mat_country","mat_facility","mat_urban_rural","study_design","module")) {
  p <- plot_variable(unified, v); if (!is.null(p)) ppt <- add_plot_slide(ppt, p, paste("Variable:", v))
}
for (v in c("hh_wealth_quintile","hh_ses_binary","hh_electricity","hh_water_source",
            "hh_sanitation","hh_cooking_fuel","hh_house_wall","hh_house_floor",
            "hh_house_ownership","hh_mosquito_net","hh_ppi_score","hh_asset_score")) {
  p <- plot_variable(unified, v); if (!is.null(p)) ppt <- add_plot_slide(ppt, p, paste("Variable:", v))
}
# v10.17: Environmental variables
for (v in c("env_elevation","env_slope","env_temp_mean_delivery","env_humidity_delivery",
            "env_precipitation_delivery","env_heat_index_delivery","env_pm25_annual",
            "env_season_delivery","env_season_conception")) {
  p <- plot_variable(unified, v); if (!is.null(p)) ppt <- add_plot_slide(ppt, p, paste("Variable:", v))
}

# Final summary
ppt <- add_title_slide(ppt, "Summary & Next Steps",
  sprintf("Total: %s records | %d countries | %d studies\n\nSBR: %.1f/1000 | NND: %.1f/1000 | PMR: %.1f/1000\nPreterm: %.1f%% | LBW: %.1f%%",
          format(nrow(unified),big.mark=","),
          n_distinct(unified$mat_country, na.rm=TRUE),
          n_distinct(unified$study_source),
          overall$SBR, overall$NND_Rate, overall$PMR,
          overall$Preterm_pct, overall$LBW_pct))

# Remove existing file if present (avoids "file is open" error)
if (file.exists(PPTX_PATH)) try(file.remove(PPTX_PATH), silent = TRUE)
print(ppt, target=PPTX_PATH)
cat(sprintf("\nPowerPoint saved: %s\n", PPTX_PATH))
cat(sprintf("Total slides: ~%d\n", length(ppt)))
```

# Session Info

```{r session-info}
cat("\n====================================================================\n")
cat("                    ANALYSIS COMPLETE\n")
cat("====================================================================\n\n")
cat(sprintf("Completed: %s\n", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")))
cat(sprintf("Version: %s\n", VERSION))
cat(sprintf("PPTX: %s\n", PPTX_PATH))
cat("\n★ v10.13 Features (merged from v10.12 + DHS integration):\n")
cat("  - All v10.12 report sections retained:\n")
cat("    - Rate verification table\n")
cat("    - Temporal distribution by year\n")
cat("    - Stillbirth by country (lollipop chart)\n")
cat("    - Age at death distribution (faceted + stacked)\n")
cat("    - GA combined histogram\n")
cat("    - Preterm rate by study\n")
cat("    - Birthweight boxplot\n")
cat("    - LBW rate by study\n")
cat("    - Apgar by study (faceted)\n")
cat("    - Age categories\n")
cat("    - Marital status\n")
cat("    - Religion\n")
cat("    - Multiple birth\n")
cat("    - SB by GA category (cross-tab)\n")
cat("    - NND by birthweight (cross-tab)\n")
cat("    - Outcomes by education (cross-tab)\n")
cat("  - v10.11+ Extended analyses retained:\n")
cat("    - Stillbirth threshold analysis (20wks vs 28wks)\n")
cat("    - Extended preterm categories (Very preterm, Extremely preterm)\n")
cat("    - Extended LBW categories (VLBW, ELBW)\n")
cat("    - Size for Gestational Age (SGA/AGA/LGA)\n")
cat("    - Hypertension staging analysis\n")
cat("    - Clinical risk factor prevalence\n")
cat("    - Outcomes by hypertension status\n")
cat("    - Outcomes by SGA status\n")
cat("    - Standardized education and delivery mode categories\n")
cat("  - ★ v10.15 UPDATES:\n")
cat("    - DHS as 7th study source (merged_unified_dataset_v10.15.rds)\n")
cat("    - Merged dataset created by DHS pipeline Step 10\n")
cat("    - GA method tracking (out_ga_method: Ballard/Clinical/Maternal recall)\n")
cat("    - GA method distribution by study (plot + table)\n")
cat("    - GA statistics by measurement method (boxplot + summary)\n")
cat("    - Outcomes by GA method cross-tabulation\n")
cat("    - Study design distribution (Facility-based vs Population-based)\n")
cat("    - Module distribution by study\n")
cat("    - DHS survey coverage by country and module\n")
cat("    - Study metadata summary table (design, module, weights)\n")
cat("    - Updated color palette with DHS\n")
cat("    - Corrected module values (NCOPS, PTBi)\n")
cat("  - ★ v10.17 UPDATES:\n")
cat("    - DHS religion labels decoded from haven and harmonised (Christian/Muslim/Traditional/No religion/Other)\n")
cat("    - DHS ethnicity labels decoded from haven (country-specific text)\n")
cat("    - DHS birth attendant extracted from m3a-m3n binary variables\n")
cat("    - Environmental data re-extracted at real GPS (55,919 unique coordinates, v3.4)\n")
cat("    - Environmental variables: elevation, slope, temperature, humidity, precipitation, heat index, PM2.5, season\n")
cat("    - GA +7 rollover fix (7,924 records corrected)\n")
cat("    - GA weeks rounded to 4 decimal places\n")
cat("    - GA obstetric string (e.g. 38+3) added\n")
cat("    - 11 clinical columns restored (mat_eclampsia, mat_aph, mat_diabetes, etc.)\n")
cat("    - Comprehensive factor conversion (83 columns) for proper Stata .dta export\n")
cat("    - Factor level fixes (3 columns with silent 100%% data loss corrected)\n")
cat("    - Value recoding: Health center/Hospital -> Health facility, Indeterminate -> Ambiguous\n")
cat("    - Implausible date capping (35 out_dob + 3,949 out_dod values capped to NA)\n")
cat("    - Character-to-numeric type conversion (27+ columns)\n")
cat("    - Column coalescing: 16 duplicate variable pairs merged\n")
cat("    - 141 columns, 5,996,390 rows across 7 studies\n\n")
sessionInfo()
```
